name: arch_inv_allows_single_layer
reason: `Arch::inv` allows architectures with only 1 layer — `entry_size_is_next_layer_size` is vacuously true when there's no next layer, permitting degenerate single-level page tables

name: arch_inv_allows_empty_layers
reason: `Arch::inv` allows an architecture with zero layers — the forall over an empty domain is vacuously true, resulting in a page table with no levels

name: upper_vaddr_not_canonical
reason: `upper_vaddr` computes to 256TB (512^2 * 1G = 2^48) which equals the 48-bit canonical address boundary — addresses at or above this are non-canonical on x86-64 without LA57
